headline: Super vs ChatGPT — personal AI agents compared for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs ChatGPT. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost. Include a long-form buyer guide with a decision matrix, migration checklist, how-to evaluation plan, and source-backed caveats.
site_brief.title: Super vs ChatGPT

summary: A fair, source-backed comparison for people choosing between ChatGPT and Super. ChatGPT excels at general conversation and ad‑hoc automation. Super is positioned for repeated computer‑use workflows, using a reusable computer-use cache so operational work compounds instead of resetting each run.
